app.title: Using Go for Mobile Apps
app.author: theHocineSaad
app.description: Using Go for Mobile App Development
proposed_tests: Clone the repository and create a new mobile app using Go
Run a simple Go program on mobile and verify functionality
Measure performance improvements by using a Go-based mobile app
